input: Lone Star Solar I is a 250 MW photovoltaic project developed by Permian Renewables LLC, interconnecting at the Big Spring 345 kV substation in ERCOT. Queue number 24INR-0421. A system impact study was completed; estimated network upgrades total $18,400,000. The requested in-service date is June 1, 2027. The project is active in the queue.
